instruments.name: frailty_index_calculator
instruments.purpose: Estimate discharge fragility from age, mobility, falls, nutrition, and recent utilization.
limitations: Requires local calibration before real use

instruments.name: secondary_infection_risk_classifier
instruments.purpose: Flag unresolved infection concern from WBC trajectory, procalcitonin trend, cultures, and fever clock.
validation_checks: borderline values escalate to clinician review
limitations: No replacement for infectious disease review

instruments.name: environmental_medication_access_rules
instruments.purpose: Represent non-clinical discharge risks that drive avoidable readmission.
validation_checks: route high access risk to support planning
limitations: Requires vetted SDOH data and fairness review

trace.action: Assemble pneumonia discharge instruments via generative toolchain (reuse-or-generate).
checks: objective: Assess pneumonia discharge readiness across clinical stability, unresolved infection risk, and non-clinical (environmental/medication-access) risk, with a mandatory human handoff.
each tool validated (bounded score, zero-input -> 0) before use

outputs: Confirm afebrile duration and current vital stability.
Evaluate WBC/procalcitonin trajectory and culture-pending status.
Estimate frailty from mobility, falls, age, nutrition, and prior utilization.
Assess medication access, adherence concern, pharmacy distance, and support availability.
Generate what-if scenarios for discharge timing and support interventions.
Prepare structured human handoff with red flags and reasoning trace.
Route updated mobility assessment before discharge sign-off.
Route care-management review for home support gap.

trace.action: Score risk and run recursive validation loop to fixed point (2 iterations).
checks: Infection risk borderline/high with pending cultures: re-evaluate before final handoff.
Access risk elevated: verify medication-in-hand or delivery before discharge.
Room-air SpO2 below 92%: confirm oxygenation stability before discharge.

trace.action: Generate what-if discharge scenarios and empathy image prompts.

evidence.interpretation: Advanced age contributes to frailty burden.
Mobility decline is a discharge support signal.
Clinical stability should be reconfirmed before discharge.
Medication access may require delivery or support.

scenarios.name: discharge_today_no_added_support
scenarios.assumption: Patient leaves today with standard instructions only.
scenarios.empathy_prompt: Create a respectful discharge-day image: an older adult at home after pneumonia, medications on a kitchen table, visible fatigue, and a phone reminder for follow-up. No fear tactics, no identifiable patient likeness, no medical gore.
scenarios.operational_trigger: Require clinician review if any individual risk band is high.

scenarios.name: delay_24h_reassess
scenarios.assumption: Discharge is delayed 24 hours for mobility reassessment, lab trend review, and oral antibiotic confirmation.
scenarios.empathy_prompt: Create a calm hospital-room planning image: clinician and patient reviewing a discharge checklist, with mobility support and medication plan visible.
scenarios.operational_trigger: Re-run Analyze after updated vitals, labs, and mobility assessment.

scenarios.name: discharge_with_medication_and_home_support
scenarios.assumption: Patient leaves with medication delivery confirmation, teach-back, and home health or caregiver support.
scenarios.empathy_prompt: Create an optimistic home-transition image: medication delivery bag, caregiver checklist, and patient resting safely with clear follow-up instructions.
scenarios.operational_trigger: Route to care management for access support and post-discharge follow-up.

handoff.summary: Synthetic runtime flags this case for clinician review before discharge.
actions_to_consider: Clinician reviews reasoning trace and confirms disposition.
Medication access is verified before discharge.
Teach-back and follow-up plan are documented.
Mobility and home support plan reviewed with care management.
Medication delivery or pharmacy access support considered.
red_flags: Afebrile duration below 48 hours in demo criteria.
handoff.clinician_note: Demo only: treating clinician must validate all findings against the real chart and local policy.

institutional_memory_event.note: Synthetic demo event. Do not store PHI.
